meta.title: The False Gospel of Roman Catholicism - Part 1
meta.author: James White

questions.question: According to White, Alpha and Omega Ministries initially focused most heavily on which movement?
White says his first two published books dealt with which topic?
The Long Island debate series White describes was connected with which radio station?
White characterizes much modern independent fundamentalist Baptist anti-Catholicism as:
options: Shallow compared to historic Protestant confessional engagement with Rome
Deeply grounded in the London Baptist Confession's anti-Roman arguments
Focused on Eastern Orthodoxy rather than Rome
questions.answer: Shallow compared to historic Protestant confessional engagement with Rome

questions.question: Which verse does White highlight as a standard Catholic proof text against sola scriptura?
White says his first debate with Jerry Matatics was in which month and year?
According to White, Jerry Matatics was notable in Presbyterian circles as:
options: The first ordained PCA minister to convert to Roman Catholicism
The moderator of the PCA General Assembly
A professor at Westminster Seminary California
questions.answer: The first ordained PCA minister to convert to Roman Catholicism

questions.question: White mentions which book series as representative of convert stories citing inability to defend sola scriptura?
White argues the Greek of Matthew 16 supports distinguishing Peter from 'this rock' partly because:
options: Peter is never named in Matthew 16
The passage is absent in the Byzantine text-type
The word 'rock' never appears in Matthew's Greek
'This rock' is third person while Peter is addressed in the second person
questions.answer: 'This rock' is third person while Peter is addressed in the second person

questions.question: Regarding 'I will give you the keys,' White emphasizes which grammatical feature?
White says binding/loosing authority is given to all the apostles together in which passage?
At the Jerusalem council (as White tells it), who gives the decisive judgment?
White claims John 21's use in Roman papal argumentation is, to his knowledge, largely absent until roughly:
White recommends searching SermonAudio for debates with Matatics from which year tied to Denver and World Youth Day?
Which Jesuit debater does White praise for unusually straightforward answers about dogma and Scripture?
The Immaculate Conception was dogmatically defined in which year?
According to White, the Immaculate Conception concerns:
options: Mary's perpetual virginity after Jesus's birth
Mary's conception without the stain of original sin
questions.answer: Mary's conception without the stain of original sin

questions.question: The dogma of Mary's bodily assumption was defined in which year?
White says the term Theotokos was dogmatically clarified especially at:
White associates Jerome especially with the development/acceptance of:
White taught for years in which city (until war disrupted normal life)?
White argues Francis's change on capital punishment creates tension because it can imply:
options: Past Catholic magisterial teaching was sinful while claimed authoritative
questions.answer: Past Catholic magisterial teaching was sinful while claimed authoritative

questions.question: Which New Testament chapter does White say appears in gold prominently in St. Peter's Basilica?
White contrasts 'conversion to the church' language (associated with Rome) with Protestant emphasis on:
White mentions a Kindle book he wrote on Marian dogmas titled:
White cites a controversial online claim that the thief on the cross was saved because:
options: Peter loosed him in the upper room
